revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{{1|Example User}}}]] ([[User talk:{{{1|Example User}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|Example User}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[https://xtools.wmcloud.org/ec?user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}&project=en.wikipedia count]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=block&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}} block log]){{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| {{documentation}} }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
